summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin Hotel Configuration & Subscription Management features. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed - Hotel management page with 6 tabs (Informations, Abonnement, Modules, Chambres, Équipements, Services) working correctly. Subscription tab shows plan info, price, users, expiry with 4 action buttons. All modals (Upgrade/Downgrade, Manage Modules, Extend Trial) open and function correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/config - returns hotel info, room_types, rooms, equipment, services, subscription (200)
Backend: PUT /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/config - update hotel info and verify persistence (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/room-types - create room type (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/room-types - duplicate code correctly rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/rooms - create room with valid type (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/rooms - invalid room type rejected (400)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/equipment - create equipment (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/services - create service (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/subscription/assign - assign plan to hotel with trial (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/subscription/modify - upgrade/downgrade plan (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/subscription/modify - add modules (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/subscription/extend-trial - extend trial period (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/subscription/modules - get current modules (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/config - 404 for nonexistent hotel
Backend: Unauthorized access correctly rejected (401/403)
Frontend: Hotel management page loads with 6 tabs (Informations, Abonnement, Modules, Chambres, Équipements, Services)
Frontend: Subscription tab shows Plan (Starter), Prix mensuel (79€), Utilisateurs max (3), Échéance (14/04/2026)
Frontend: 4 action buttons visible: Upgrade/Downgrade, Gérer les Modules, Prolonger l'essai, Mettre en pause
Frontend: Upgrade/Downgrade modal opens with plan selection and apply immediately toggle
Frontend: Manage Modules modal opens with 21 module toggles (Switch components)
Frontend: Extend Trial modal opens with days input and reason field
Frontend: Chambres tab shows room types (2) and rooms (1) with Add buttons
Frontend: Room type modal opens for creating new room types
Frontend: Équipements tab loads with Add button
Frontend: Services tab shows services list with Add button
Frontend: Informations tab shows hotel form with Save button
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed room types, rooms, equipment, and services during backend testing. Test hotel used: TEST_Cancel_012c9cb8 (ID: 4b5e6e34-19e4-4bc8-82e6-7a053b7e9a17)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotel Configuration & Subscription Management fully tested. Hotel management page accessed via /superadmin/hotels/{hotelId}. Page has 6 tabs: Informations (hotel info form), Abonnement (subscription with 4 action buttons), Modules (module list), Chambres (room types + rooms), Équipements, Services. All CRUD operations work. Subscription actions: assign, modify (upgrade/downgrade/add modules), extend trial. Plans available: Starter (79€/mois, 3 users, 2 modules) and Business (199€/mois, 15 users, 4 modules, featured).

hotel_config_api.get_config: GET /api/superadmin/hotels/{id}/config - returns hotel, room_types, rooms, equipment, services, subscription
